data.title: Jack Dorsey 'Really Excited' About Block's Bitcoin Mining Suite That Could Challenge Foreign Dominance: 'Customers Want Other Options'
data.description: Jack Dorsey, co-founder and executive chair of Block Inc. (NYSE:XYZ), voiced optimism for the firm’s Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) mining products suite, Proto, on Thursday, hoping to gain

data.title: Alibaba Spikes 11% In Hong Kong As Tencent, Xiaomi Lead Tech Rally On Earnings Optimism, Chinese Stimulus Hopes
data.description: Chinese technology stocks advanced sharply on Friday, with Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. jumping 11.41% in Hong Kong trading, as investors responded to positive earnings guidance and anticipated monetary policy easing from Beijing.

data.title: Apple Stock Has Run Up Over 10% In A Month, Jim Cramer Says iPhone Maker Is 'Ramping' And The Credit Goes To Chinese Subsidies
data.description: Apple Inc. shares have gained over 10% in the past month, with CNBC's Jim Cramer attributing recent momentum to Chinese government subsidies covering Apple products.

data.title: Gary Black Left Unimpressed By Rivian's Earnings : Calls 2025 Guidance 'Clearly Weak'
data.description: Rivian Automotive Inc. shares rose over 5% in after-hours trading Wednesday before pulling back, despite delivering conservative 2025 guidance, as strong regulatory credit sales helped the electric vehicle maker beat fourth-quarter expectations.

data.title: Meta Stock Has Soared Almost 50% Over A Year But Now The Company Is Slashing Staff Stock Awards As It Braces To Face OpenAI, Amazon And Others In AI Race
data.description: Meta is reportedly reducing employee stock awards by 10% while ramping up AI investments to as much as $65 billion in 2025.
